text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the end of the year. Tokai Teio goes to the
Nakayama Racecourse to watch Symboli Rudolf
compete in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After seeing Symboli Rudolf absolutely dominate
the race, Tokai Teio truly feels the difference
between her and her hero.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, her wish to stand on the same level as
Symboli Rudolf doesn't change.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll never give up, no matter how treacherous
the journey. Tokai Teio hardens her resolve once
more.
